member.name: P:SIE.EMS.EquipRepair.ApiModels.RepairBillQueryInfo.RepairStates
member.summary: 维修状态 0:(ApplyRepair, 报修) 1:(WaitRepair, 待维修) 2:(Repairing, 维修中) 3:(WaitConfirm, 待确认) 4:(WaitScore, 待评分) 5:(Completed, 已完成) 6:(Suspending, 暂停中) 7:(Cancel, 取消) 8:(Closed, 关闭)
